mapper.select: SELECT id, name, description, status, sort_order, create_time FROM forum_board WHERE status = 'NORMAL' ORDER BY sort_order ASC, id ASC

SELECT b.id, b.name, b.description, b.status, b.sort_order, b.create_time, ( SELECT COUNT(*)::int FROM forum_post p WHERE p.board_id = b.id AND p.status = 'NORMAL' ) AS post_count FROM forum_board b ORDER BY b.sort_order ASC, b.id ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO forum_board(name, description, status, sort_order, create_time) VALUES(#{name}, #{description}, 'NORMAL', #{sortOrder}, now())
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM forum_post WHERE board_id = #{boardId} AND status = 'NORMAL'
